__comment: Dashboard-as-code for the netscan_sweep measurement. The Observability Pack supervisor provisions every registered tool's dashboards/*.json into Grafana on install. Referenced by the networkmanager manifest's `dashboards` field.
title: Network — Host Presence

targets.query:
from(bucket: "utilities")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netscan_sweep" and r._field == "hosts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.subnet == "${subnet}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
